# NumberIQ — numberiq.in

> Free GST, TDS, income-tax and international-tax reference, calculators and rate charts for Indian finance professionals. Written by a Chartered Accountant in Mumbai. Grounded in the bare Indian tax law (Income-tax Act 1961 & 2025, CGST Act 2017, FEMA), with section, rule, notification and circular citations on every page. Last reviewed: June 2026.

## Tools (interactive, client-side — no data leaves the browser)
- [Invoice Verification](https://numberiq.in/Invoice%20Compliance.html): Validate GST tax invoices for the mandatory particulars under Rule 46, CGST Rules 2017.
- [GST Input Reconciliation (ReCo Studio / IMS)](https://numberiq.in/GST_ReCO_Studio_IMS_FIXED.html): Reconcile purchase register vs GSTR-2B / IMS to claim correct ITC under Section 16.
- [HSN / SAC Finder](https://numberiq.in/HSN_SAC_Finder.html): Look up HSN codes for goods and SAC codes for services with GST rates.
- [TDS Rate Finder FY 2026-27](https://numberiq.in/numberiq-tds-chart-fy2026-27.html): Search TDS rates and thresholds, mapped to the new Income-tax Act 2025 sections.
- [GST Late Fee Calculator](https://numberiq.in/gst-late-fee-calculator.html): Section 47 late fee for delayed GSTR-1 / GSTR-3B with daily caps.
- [GST Interest Calculator](https://numberiq.in/gst-interest-calculator.html): Section 50 interest on delayed GST payment / wrong ITC.
- [TDS Interest Calculator](https://numberiq.in/tds-interest-calculator.html): Section 201(1A) interest for late deduction / late deposit of TDS.
- [Advance Tax Calculator](https://numberiq.in/advance-tax-calculator.html): Quarterly advance-tax instalments for FY 2026-27.
- [Income Tax Calculator FY 2026-27](https://numberiq.in/income-tax-calculator-fy2026-27.html): Old vs new regime tax computation.
- [234A/B/C Interest Calculator](https://numberiq.in/interest-234abc-calculator.html): Interest for default in advance tax and late ITR filing.
- [All tools library](https://numberiq.in/tools.html): Searchable hub of every NumberIQ finance tool.

## Rate charts (reference tables, updated for FY 2026-27)
- [GST Rate Chart 2026](https://numberiq.in/gst-rate-chart-2026.html)
- [TCS Rate Chart FY 2026-27](https://numberiq.in/tcs-rate-chart-fy2026-27.html)
- [Income Tax Slab FY 2026-27](https://numberiq.in/income-tax-slab-fy2026-27.html)
- [PF / ESI / PT Rate Chart 2026](https://numberiq.in/pf-esi-pt-rate-chart-2026.html)
- [GST Late Fee Chart FY 2026-27](https://numberiq.in/gst-late-fee-chart-fy2026-27.html)
- [Advance Tax Due Dates FY 2026-27](https://numberiq.in/advance-tax-due-dates-fy2026-27.html)
- [Compliance Due-Date Calendar FY 2026-27](https://numberiq.in/due-date-calendar.html)

## Articles & glossary
- [Insights — all articles](https://numberiq.in/insights.html): 100+ practitioner articles on GST, TDS, direct tax, transfer pricing, DTAA, FEMA and the Income-tax Act 2025.
- [Glossary](https://numberiq.in/glossary/): Plain-language definitions of Indian tax terms (ITC, RCM, GSTR-2B, DTAA, arm's length price, and more).

## About
- Owner: a Chartered Accountant based in Mumbai, working in-house (not in practice).
- Content is for general guidance only and does not constitute professional advice; verify the current position and consult a qualified CA before acting.
- Authority sources cited: incometax.gov.in, gst.gov.in, cbic.gov.in, mca.gov.in, rbi.org.in.
